quality_principles: Always apply retrieved policy exceptions before issuing a denial.
External replies must not contain raw customer identifiers.
High-confidence resolutions require corroborating tool evidence.
Candidate context must not be written to eval or long-term memory unless retention is justified.
Salary expectations require explicit retention policy and candidate-facing control before storage.
Recruiting notes should preserve only context needed to serve the candidate and hiring workflow.
An incident is not resolved until metric recovery is verified as passed.
Service restart alone does not constitute resolution.
All verification artifacts must be present before status is set to resolved.
